background: Determine whether numbers in the exercise are parameters or statistics based on a study of breast cancer cases in California.

task.query: There were 18,800 new cases of female breast cancer in the state of California in 2005.
A study of 1225 of these cases finds that survival varied greatly by stage of diagnosis. The average 7-year survival rate for stage I breast cancer was 92%.
For stage II breast cancer, the 7-year survival was 71%.
For stage III breast cancer, the survival was 39%.
For stage IV, the survival rate was 11%.
